properties.name: camel.opentelemetry2.disable-core-processors
properties.description: Disable any inner core processors (any core DSL processor provided in the route, for example `bean`, `log`, ...).

properties.name: camel.opentelemetry2.exclude-patterns
properties.description: Sets exclude pattern(s) that will disable tracing for Camel processors that matches the pattern. Multiple patterns can be separated by comma.

properties.name: camel.opentelemetry2.trace-processors
properties.description: Setting this to true will create new telemetry spans for each Camel custom Processors. Use the excludePattern property to filter out Processors.
